_comment: Owner tips — add rows here. enforcement: code (Python gate) | agent (skill/memory only) | both

tips.title: Course is creative source
tips.content: Creative direction comes from data/research/course/ only — not config defaults or retired lanes.

tips.title: Disclose AI generated
tips.content: Module 1: disclose all content as AI-generated on every upload (ZERNIO_DECLARE_AIGC / TikTok is_aigc).

tips.title: Module 1 QC before upload
tips.content: Zero Module 1 Video Don'ts and Posting Don'ts — run module1_qc before any video upload.

tips.title: Bubble wrap is 2-photo carousel
tips.content: Bubble wrap = 2 PNGs with captions baked in, Zernio photo carousel — never auto-play MP4 slideshow.

tips.title: Bubble slide QC
tips.content: Run bubble_wrap slide QC on hook + CTA PNGs before carousel upload.

tips.title: Banned caption phrases
tips.content: No sale/price/discount bait in captions (triple discount, flash sale, coupon glitch, etc.).

tips.title: Posting spacing rules
tips.content: Respect per-account post interval and no duplicate product same day (Module 1 posting don'ts).

tips.title: Mackenzie sound handoff
tips.content: API cannot attach Mackenzie sound — owner finishes in TikTok app (inbox draft or edit after post).

tips.title: Plain English for owner
tips.content: Owner is not a developer — one step at a time, plain English, no jargon dumps.

tips.title: No inventing strategy
tips.content: Execute orders from course + owner overrides — rare creativity only when explicitly asked.
